purpose: LLM-feedback arm of the core 150-episode benchmark: NVIDIA NIM llama-3.1-8b-instruct (authorized GPT-4o substitute, registry 3.1) decides a continuous gamma_new at the frozen per-instance feedback time, on the velocity-tube controller base.

controller_base.rationale: Predeclared per user directive 2026-07-17: the scripted arm proved gamma-only feedback is outcome-inert on the static base (150/150 concordant, p=1.0); the LLM arm therefore runs on the velocity-tube base, the only profile with headroom (55 timeouts, 24 collisions).

provider.name: nvidia_nim
provider.request_policy: one gamma decision per episode at its frozen feedback_intervention_time_s; identical prompts may be served from the local checkpoint cache, so unique requests may be fewer than 150
provider.replay_rule: every request/response checkpointed verbatim before use; reruns must replay from checkpoints and consume zero new requests

feedback_protocol.user_utterance: Watch out! I think it's going to crash soon.
feedback_protocol.utterance_source: paper Table-4 ablation protocol, Section V-C
feedback_protocol.context_given_to_llm: current gamma (0.15), task instruction, scene summary (EE-reach, one moving spherical obstacle), per paper eq. (16) OF inputs
feedback_protocol.gamma_output_range: continuous (0, 1] per paper Tables 1-2 (paper-fidelity path, registry 3.3)
feedback_protocol.table2_label_recording: every decision is logged with its Table-2 label: 1 (0,0.06], 2 (0.06,0.08], 3 (0.08,0.15], 4 =0.15, 5 (0.15,1]
feedback_protocol.application_time: feedback_intervention_time_s + measured_api_latency_s (recorded per episode; no idealized zero latency)
feedback_protocol.invalid_output_policy: unparseable or out-of-range outputs are recorded and the episode keeps gamma 0.15 (no retry, no silent substitution)

statistics.primary: paired collision_free_goal_success vs safe_panda_core_velocity_tube, exact McNemar per family, Holm across families
statistics.note: gamma > 0.15 loosens safety below the fixed arm; this is an accepted possible outcome of the paper-faithful continuous range and must be reported, not clamped

claim_limits: simulator-only, EE-reach-only, GPT-4o substituted by NIM llama-3.1-8b-instruct
no formal bounded-error safety claim (Gaussian noise)
descriptive result for this repository's profiles; not a reproduction of the paper's Table 4
